name: Deploy Ready
description: Deploy readiness is not about whether the code is correct. It is about whether the infrastructure, configuration, and pipeline are ready to receive it. A correct feature with a broken deploy config ships nothing. Verify the config before the merge — not after.

extras.text: What deploy platform is this targeting? Is the deploy config current and correct for this change? Is there a staging environment where this can be verified before production?

specSections.title: Deploy Configuration
specSections.placeholder: _What deploy platform? What config files need updating (fly.toml, render.yaml, vercel.json, etc.)? Can old and new config coexist during a rolling deploy? Rollback command?_

specSections.title: Environment Variables
specSections.placeholder: _Every new env var: name, purpose, required vs optional, example value, which environments need it. Add to deploy config, .env.example, and README if user-facing._

specSections.title: Staging Verification
specSections.placeholder: _Steps to verify on staging before production: deploy command, smoke test steps, health check endpoint, expected output. 'Works on my machine' is not staging verification._

reminders: Deploy config first: if the change requires a new environment variable, a new service, a new deploy target, or a changed build command — the config must be updated BEFORE the code ships.
Staging verification: the change must be deployed to staging and manually verified before production. 'Works on my machine' is not staging verification.

Environment variable audit: every new env var must be documented (name, purpose, required vs optional, example value) and added to the deploy config, the local .env.example, and the README if user-facing.
Health check: after deploy, the first action is to verify the health endpoint responds correctly. Do not declare deploy success until the health check passes.
Rollback plan: every deploy needs a documented rollback plan. What command reverts to the previous version? How long does rollback take? What data mutations need to be reversed?
acceptanceCriteria: Deploy platform detected and config file present (fly.toml / render.yaml / vercel.json / netlify.toml / etc.)
All new environment variables documented and added to deploy config
Staging deployment successful and manually verified
Health check passes after staging deploy
No hardcoded staging/production URLs in application code
